headline: QUESTIONS THAT EXPOSE SUPPLIER RISK
subheading: Build a risk-tiered, evidence-led questionnaire aligned to EU GMP, GDP and ICH Q9.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking pharmaceutical supplier qualification and risk assessment. A precise grid of floating frosted-glass assessment cards arranged in tiered layers, each card holding minimalist abstract checkmark and document-icon glyphs rendered as glowing teal and cyan etched lines, the tiers descending in scale to suggest risk stratification from high to low. A delicate luminous network of connecting threads links the cards like a controlled supply chain, with one card spotlit and lifted forward in crisp focus while the rest recede into soft deep-navy bokeh. A faint magnifying lens of light passes over the foreground card hinting at scrutiny and verification. Stainless-steel and frosted-glass surfaces catch cool reflections, a single fresh-green accent glows at one verified node. Deep navy background, teal and cyan luminance, clinical-luxury mood, shallow depth of field, premium and exact. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
